description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set on a spacious green lot, surrounded by mature trees and landscaped gardens. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels and sections, including a main living area, attached garage, and several outdoor patios. Expansive windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The property includes a swimming pool and a paved driveway, with various walkways connecting different parts of the house and garden. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or concrete, with some areas accented by darker trim and glass. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A spacious, modern bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, set on a green lot with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, and landscaped garden with several trees.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat roof layout, swimming pool, and extensive green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, additional garden space, and more windows.
description_view_3: Side view revealing the multi-level roof sections, side garden, and secondary entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
